message:
feat(e2e): add comprehensive Beads UI E2E tests (bd-eykm)

Add 49 Playwright E2E tests covering beads page CRUD flows:

- Page display tests: header, table columns, tracked count, buttons
- Status pill tests: open/in_progress/blocked/closed tones
- Create flow: modal, form validation, submission, defaults
- Claim flow: button visibility by status, status transition
- Close flow: modal, reason input, confirmation, status update
- Edit flow: modal fields, data population, save changes
- Error handling: API failures, empty lists
- Refresh functionality: loading states, reload behavior
- Responsiveness: desktop/tablet/mobile viewports
- Navigation integration: sidebar nav, state preservation

Tests include network request logging for debugging failures.
Playwright captures trace, screenshot, and video on failure.

Closes bd-eykm (parent of bd-27xr epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
